Subject: Re: UPDATE ON US STEEL: READOUT OF STEEL MANUFACTURERS ASSOCIATION MEETING

Ambassador,

We met briefly when you popped into DBT a few weeks ago. Just to reassure you, we
have printed out this readout, and your other note, and will deliver it to the Secretary of
State’ s house.

| will also make sure you get the final version of the general briefing the team has
produced very shortly.

Allthe best,
Kal
He Kalada Bruce-Jaja | Principal Private Secretary
ihe Department for Business and Trade | Old Admiralty Building,

Department for London. SW1A 2DY
